programme.title: Corazón indomable: Gran encuentro
programme.desc: Don Alejandro conoce a Maricruz y empieza a interrogarla, Octavio busca a Maricruz en la pensión pues se entera que ahora vive ahí.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Manuel entristece al saber que Guillermo está internado en el hospital. Magnolia idea un plan para evitar que Guillermo muera. Candy le promete a Meche que la ayudará a sacar a Guillermo del hospital.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Guillermo ya está fuera de peligro, pero pronto se lo llevarán a la cárcel Meche se pone muy feliz al descubrir que está embarazada.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Renato le confiesa a Sergio que mató a Nicandro, que Marimar es inocente y que fue inculpada por Angélica. Bella le informa a Bernardo que ella se hará cargo de las finanzas del club.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: El gobernador está muy interesado en Bella y él le cuenta que Sergio planea casarse con su hija Rodolfo San Genis planea una fiesta para robarse a Bella.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Don Fernando decide darle a Soraya solo una pequeña cantidad mensual para mantenerse. María intenta convencer a Luis Fernando de trabajar en la empresa de su padre. Soraya siente celos al ver que Luis Fernando pasa tiempo con María.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Luis Fernando regresa del casino y le muestra a María que no se gastó el dinero de su padre y le dice cosas bonitas para volver a enamorarla. Fernando sufre un ataque al corazón al saber que Luis Fernando tiene deudas de juego.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: María Mercedes le dice a Jorge Luis que está esperando un hijo suyo. Jorge Luis se cae de las escaleras y se lastima el pie.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Malvina tiene un nuevo plan para perjudicar a Maria Mercedes Jorge Luis le dice a María Mercedes que huya o será él quien se vaya de su lado.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Justino va a buscar al hotel al doctor Alejandro para impedir que se case con Antonia y lo avienta desde el balcón. El padre Basilio es testigo de la muerte de Alejandro y culpa a Justino. Mariela busca la forma de que Max pague por su infidelidad.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Mariela y Malena se enteran de que la policía busca a Justino porque fue acusado de abuso. José María está confundido por las intrigas de Max y le reclama a Violeta que le haya mentido. Pantaleón esconde al único testigo de la muerte de Alejandro.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Gustavo se llena de esperanza al pensar que Ana Paula podría decidir quedarse con él. Vanesa rompe su sociedad con David para evitar que siga arruinando sus tierras. Rogelio lleva a cabo sus planes para adoptar a Margarito.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Bruno lleva a cabo sus planes para deshacerse de David. Rogelio se molesta al saber que David fue el responsable de envenenar su ganado. Ana Paula decide alejarse de Rogelio y Gustavo. Vanesa emborracha a Rogelio para pasar la noche con él.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Ana Paula siente celos al ver que Cynthia no se separa de Gustavo. Macaria se molesta al saber que Ulises piensa ayudar a Consuelo en sus estudios. Rogelio entristece al enterarse de que no podrá adoptar a Margarito.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Cynthia idea un nuevo plan para deshacerse de Ana Paula. Vanesa le hace creer a Rogelio que le interesa encontrar a Margarito solo para poder acercarse a él. Ana Paula le confiesa a Rogelio que el hijo que espera es de Gustavo.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Violeta entristece al saber que su operación no fue exitosa. Alejandro prepara todo para casarse cuanto antes con Antonia. Candela enfrenta a Violeta para confesarle que José María no la ama.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Amor robado
programme.desc: Elena intenta convencer a Sandra de que se case con Damián. Alex descubre el escondite donde tienen encerrada a María José.

programme.title: La desalmada: Información secreta
programme.desc: David cree que Rafael le da información a Octavio sobre su campaña. La madre de Brenda la visita en la hacienda de Octavio para dividir la herencia de Alberto. César Franco le confiesa a Fernanda que está enamorado de ella.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Mentira descubierta
programme.desc: Alfonsina le reclama a Florencia por su mentira y ella se defiende, convenciéndola de que Elisa le quiere quitar a Damián.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Amor a medias
programme.desc: Ivana idea un nuevo plan para separar a Valentina de José Miguel. Leonor sospecha que Isabel está interesada en Federico. Isabel le pide a Ivana que la ayude a terminar con la relación de José Miguel y Valentina.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Del lado correcto
programme.desc: Darío le pide a Fabricio que mate a Eugenio, su padre. Victoria se entera de que Majo está embarazada. Adriana se niega a ser cómplice de José Luis.

programme.title: La usurpadora: Próximo juicio
programme.desc: Douglas lleva a cabo sus planes para liberar a Paulina de la cárcel. Estefanía se emociona al saber que su hijo nació sano. Edmundo le da la noticia a Paulina que pronto se llevará a cabo un juicio para saber si queda en libertad.

programme.title: La Gata: Lejos por un tiempo
programme.desc: Inés quiere robar el dinero que se juntó en la kermesse y amenaza a Esmeralda con una pistola. Esmeralda le dice a su familia que decidió internarse en un instituto para su rehabilitación.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Una nueva esperanza
programme.desc: Efraín aconseja a Cynthia que le dé a Gustavo parte se herencia para poder deshacerse de él. Miguel decide dejar de tomar. Ana Paula le confirma a María que sí está embrazada. Rogelio se pone feliz al saber que pronto podría volver a caminar.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.sub-title: Una luz al fondo del tinaco
programme.desc: María intenta lavar el tanque de agua y queda atrapada en él. En el almacén, Carmelo juega con Delfino y Betza. Doña Lucha no sabe que María está dentro del tinaco y prende la bomba.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Tercer aniversario del coma de María, se apoya a San Hipoclorito arcángel, Albertano la recuerda y Doña Lucha se cree elegida, pide canonizar a Hipoclorito arcángel por milagroso y piensa que María debe morir, va al hospital y trata de desconectarla.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica y Ludovico son evaluados por una trabajadora social para verificar si son buenos padres Federica y Ludovico quieren tomar ventaja de que están solos para viajar a Hawai.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico se compromete a llevar a toda la familia al cine, pero las cosas no salen como esperaba y al final ninguno logra disfrutar la película.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Rocío se muda a la casa de Paco ya que necesita reposo y cuidados constantes por un supuesto embarazo de alto riesgo. Debido a esto, ella aprovechará para explotar a Paco, Fran y Toña.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Fran se inscribe en clases de pintura y se siente atraído por la profesora. Mientras mejora sus habilidades, intenta retratar a una modelo profesional que enamora a Paco. Ambos competirán por su atención.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Erika Buenfil acude a la colonia para encontrar a nuevos talentos, pero termina conociendo a los vecinos. Además, don Hipólito tiene un nuevo trabajo para Germán.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Es el cumpleaños de Luisito Jr. y Silvia se dispone a realizar una fiesta en privado. Sin embargo, los vecinos descubren el festejo y arman una celebración en grande.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte: Todo fue una mentira
programme.desc: Márgara trata de reunir a los héroes y Zacarías regresa a la banda. Hassan secuestra a Prisca. Los héroes se presentan ante los medios y hay reacciones encontradas.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: El Vítor se molesta con Albertano porque salieron tarde para buscar trabajo. Albertano y el Vítor no traen dinero para los tacos en un puesto, por lo que el Huevo y el Bizco los pagan para que trabajen para ellos.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.sub-title: De la calle a la televisión
programme.desc: Albertano les cuenta al Vítor, Rosita y doña Cuca que toda su vida soñó con ser cantautor. Doña Cuca les dice a Albertano y el Vítor que no les dará de desayunar hasta que le paguen todo lo que le deben.

programme.title: Una familia de diez: El yerberito llegó
programme.desc: Aldolfo pierde el bono huachicolero por bañarse, y con la ayuda de Jacinta se convierte en hierbero. Carlos recibe regalos de un admirador secreto.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mia se entera que Sabrina estará en el concierto de RBD en Monterrey y se entristece Max llega a Puerto Vallarta y, al ver a Celina, le dice que la quiere. Roberta le dice a Mia que no permita que Sabrina le quite las ganas de cantar.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: José y Celina se asustan al ver a Javier y al enterarse que León está en Puerto Vallarta el concierto de RBD fue un éxito, y Mia le agradece a Roberta sus consejos Javier le dice a León que Diego esta con una chica para distraerlo.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Los chicos de RBD sufren porque en el avión en el que viajan tienen unas terribles turbulencias provocadas por una tormenta.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Los muchachos de RBD llegan a Puerto Vallarta para reunirse con los otros estudiantes del colegio. Los estudiantes conviven haciendo diversas actividades en la playa. Diego reta a Javier a una carrera en moto acuática y el ganador se queda con Rob.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Kristine and Terry needed more living space for their expanding family. They decided to add a second story addition over the garage in order to add a bedroom and bathroom. When the contractor demanded full payment before the job was completed, the homeowners refused to pay. The contractor placed a Lien on their home stating that the renovation was 99 percent complete. Mike and the team finish the job and demonstrate just how incomplete the job really was.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes

programme.title: Holmes on Homes

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Jane and Ron had a tiny quarter sized water stain on the bedroom ceiling of their six-year-old townhouse. They had a roofing contractor come and repair the balcony above the leak. The contractor ended up having to rip up the existing balcony membrane only to discover the engineered joists below were completely rotted through. The homeowners could not find a contractor willing to take on fixing this structural mess and asked Mike if he was up for the challenge.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.sub-title: Living Room (Vern Yip) + Dining Room (Chenault James)
programme.desc: Vern Yip creates a stunning foyer and a living room that's practically indestructible. Meanwhile, Kentucky designer Chenault James was determined to change that dialogue for our Whole Home Concept House. Her ace in the hole: commissioning her husband, Ed James of Four Boards Woodworking, to craft a shape-shifting table with three distinct uses.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.sub-title: Music Room (Monet Masters of Forbes + Masters) + Back Porch (Barclay Butera)
programme.desc: With the overwhelming task of taking on the music room in Nashville, the capital of live music, Monet Masters jumped right in without hesitation—and soon decided the best way to make a statement was to skip the traditional lounge aesthetic (dark and moody) in favor of a light, bright space with serious flavor. To create this complete outdoor living space, Newport Beach, California, designer Barclay Butera chose coral, white, and blue powder-​coated finishes for the furniture, then layered them with hard-wearing indoor-outdoor fabrics from Kravet in a range of patterns.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.sub-title: Master Bedroom (Jackson Paige) + Kids' Rooms (Amy Berry)
programme.desc: Designer Kristine Paige Kamenstein, of Jackson Paige Interiors, thinks it should be both and focused on this when creating her space within the house. Also, Dallas-​based designer Amy Berry had this in mind when she wrapped the boy's room in a mural of the Virginia countryside, and the girl's in a French blue toile.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: "Mercado da Ribeira", in the Santos Area nearby Cais do Sodré train station, has been open since the 1800s and is the city's oldest marketplace. Here you can find all sorts of dairy products, fresh fish, vegetables, and fruits. It was refurbished in 2014 and it is now possible to eat gourmet signature meals there from the most quintessential chefs in Portugal.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The Viktualienmarkt developed from an original farmers' market to a popular market for gourmets. The market also hosts a number of traditional and folkloric events. But the center of the social life of the city is the world-famous Biergarten - here the seven historical breweries of the city pour the finest beers of the world.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: Placed in the middle of Palermo's ancient streets, it is almost difficult to walk. All around there is a swarm of colors and perfumes. There is everything the Mediterranean island, so rich in agricultural traditions, has to offer. Street food here is a must, including dozens of roasted, salted, pickled, and fried specialties one can count on.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: Ireland's third-largest city has one of Northern Europe's market gems: The English Market. It supplies high-quality food to affluent English families unlike the Irish market, which no longer exists. The best Irish produce today remains on the island and can be found here.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: Perhaps one of the most beautiful and well-organized food market buildings in Europe is the Mercado Central of Valencia. Built on the area where an open-air market stood for centuries, the Valencian style Art Noveau construction is a 'Cathederal of senses'.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The Fish Market or Torget (the square) has a charming location in the heart of the city between the fjords and Bergen's seven mountains. On the harbor, the stalls sell an incredible variety of fresh fish and seafood like urchins, scallops, prawns, and lobsters, but also local farm food.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The Kapani market is situated just behind the Aristotelous square of the city of Thessaloniki, facing the Aegean Sea. Exploring this market is exploring the city and its history: a tasteful mix of Sephardic, Balkan, Turkish, and Greek delights. All can be found in the intricate streets of the market or tasted at the many cafés and tavernas operating there daily.

programme.title: Chasing The Sun: Asia
programme.desc: From urban bustle to tranquil beaches, Taiwan has a soul and culture all its own. Creativity abounds in its people, not to mention the greatest vegan food in the world.

programme.title: Chasing The Sun: Asia
programme.desc: Explore a place where it's illegal to be a tattoo artist and the people living in a rapidly changing culture. A place where GPS limitations mean the possibilities to get lost in music and art are endless.

programme.title: Chasing The Sun: Asia
programme.desc: Land of the rising sun and the fastest trains in the world that takes us from skateboarders to drag queens and one of the last remaining old-world jazz bars. We meet a chalk artist and a sculptor who makes art with a bite (aka: real teeth).

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.sub-title: Nairobi: Green City in the Sun
programme.desc: Nairobi is known as a hard city, full of crime and political corruption, yet it's as cosmopolitan and as cultured as it gets. In order to get to the heart of what it means to be Kenyan, David meets an eclectic variety of local artists and entrepreneurs who open his eyes to the joys, the challenges, and the vibrancy of life in the city and in the ghetto. Through music, art and performance, the people of Nairobi showcase their passions and heritage.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.desc: The Rocco family journeys into the Maasai Mara to have a truly unique and life-changing experience: a Safari adventure to top anyone's bucket list. They learn a thing or two about the circle of life, and spend a day with the nomadic Maasai tribe in their village. David gets a first-hand lesson in what it's like to be a traditional Maasai warrior, from their roles in the community, to their rituals, and finally to their feasts.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.desc: In a city that is still evolving in its identity in the post-Apartheid era, Johannesburg's massive street art scene has caused it to become the cutting edge of modern art in Africa. David spends the day exploring the city with local graffiti artists, learning its history, and sampling its local cuisine. From roadside braai to hipster world markets, the food in Jo'burg proves that the city is at the epicenter of Africa's multifaceted cultural explosion.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.desc: Known for being the home of South African heroes Nelson Mandela and Desmond Tutu, the township of Soweto was, in years past, known as a rough outskirt of Johannesburg. Through the locals and their delicious home-cooked BBQ, David discovers that there's more to Soweto than meets the eye. With a powerful art and dance culture that's full of passion and energy, this tight-knit community is growing into a formidable city of its own.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.desc: With only 12-hours' notice to attend a wedding in Tanzania's capital city, it's a good thing David is in Dar es Salaam, a major hub of fashion, textiles and trade on Africa's East coast. Though he doesn't manage to blend in with the locals at the wedding, he does get to sample the local food available at the Coco beach market, and to take a trip out of the bustling city to an easy-going fishing village to soak up its fresh seafood market. After spending time with a local hotel owner who built hi

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Africa
programme.desc: David speaks with several of the diaspora, Ethiopian-born people who have spent the majority of their lives abroad and have recently moved back to the capital city, Addis Ababa. He realizes that the true spirit of the country, with its reputation for poverty and famine, lies in the younger generations whose entrepreneurial drive and appreciation for preserving their unique culture are paving a new future for a modern Ethiopia.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Gir National Park: India - Asia's Last Lion
programme.desc: In the west of India live wildcats which you wouldn't expect in India: lions. They live and roam freely in a surrounding where natives live as well. The Maldhari are proud to live in a region together with the lions, although they kill their cattle now and then. The north of Gujarat is mostly a desert where seminomads live. The Fakirani Jat breed a very special camel race: Karai-Camels which are able to swim. The camels swim daily around 3 kilometres to mangrove islands to feed.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Kinabatangan River: Borneo - Forgotten Paradise
programme.desc: The Kinabatangan winds for over 560 kilometres across the north of Borneo. Nowhere else in Sabah live as many wild and rare animals as along the river: Orang-Utans, Elephants, crocodiles and proboscis monkeys. But the biodiversity is endangered because more and more palm oil plantations replace the rainforest. The natives fight for the preservation of the forest and the unique wildlife.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Pu Mat National Park: Vietnam - Of Bears and Men
programme.desc: The jungle in the north of Vietnam is nearly impenetrable and there are parts where no human has ever set foot on before. The rainforest oft he Pu Mat Nationalpark is a retreat for threatened animals like the Asian black bear, pangonlins or rare species of monkeys. Tuan, a biologist and specialist for bears, explores the untouched regions of the nationalpark to find the black bear. The animals which are hunted the most are Pangolins. It is believed that their scale has healing power and their meat is considered a delicacy. A small vietnamese animal protection organisation fights for the suvival of this species.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Great Gobi National Park: Mongolia - Following the Wild Camels
programme.desc: The Great Gobi Nationalpark in the southwest of Mongolia is home oft he most fascinationg mammals alive: the wild camels. The arcaic desert, impenetrable and misterious, ist he home of approximately 800 wild camels which are nearly extinct. The Gobi is one of the most sparsely populated areas around the world. We experience humans which live in the rough and misanthropic desert: Jangaa who breeds camels and specialises in camel polo Surendjav who owns a salt mine Erdene who built an oasis in the middle of the dessert.

programme.title: A Day in Big Sur 2
programme.desc: Transport your senses to the rugged yet exquisitely beautiful Big Sur coast of California to relax & absorb the healing sights and sounds of McWay Falls from a unique and rare perspective. Filmed more than a decade ago and remastered for maximum color and quality, "A Day in Big Sur" showcases the timeless beauty of this magical destination and attempts to truly capture the spirit of this natural paradise through the use of 50+ artistically framed video perspectives - all featuring real stereo nature sounds for an immersive relaxation experience.

programme.title: Lover's island & Entalula beach
programme.desc: Get inspired by powder-white beaches and shimmering waters, in this idyllic vacation destination.

programme.title: Wildlife Wonders of South America
programme.desc: "Wildlife Wonders of South America" begins at sunrise in the Salar De Uyuni, where viewers will enjoy a vibrant array of flamingo and llama scenes from the unique high altitude volcanic salt lakes. From there, we move south down to the Chilean landscapes of San Pedro Atacama to enjoy a miracle of new life and welcoming of an adorable Vicuńa baby. Last but most certainly not least, you'll be gracefully transported to the infamous Torres Del Paine National Park in Patagonia.

programme.title: Flow of Life
programme.desc: Flow of life is a relaxing film full of beautiful images of amazing landscapes. Mountains, Forests, Creeks and Rivers as well as Butterflies, Bees, Bumblebees, lizards and more. Also included are gentle breath reminders to assist in a meditative experience. All scored with relaxing music, composed by Chris Collins.

programme.title: Halloween Party
programme.desc: Halloween Party S1E1 — Bold colors and haunting melodies bring out the magic of Halloween, inviting viewers to revel in the merriment of the holiday. From grinning skulls to moonlit scenes, the collection enchants with its lighthearted take on spooky.

programme.title: Pink Warriors
programme.desc: Pink Warriors S1E1 — This art collection captures unyielding power of women, mirroring the brave fight against breast cancer. The infusion of pink spreads awareness and celebrates the strength within every woman while the music adds an uplifting celebration of life.

programme.title: Hispanic Artists Now II
programme.desc: Diverse Perspectives: Hispanic Artists Now E2 — From bold murals to evocative photographs, this collection illuminates the rich heritage and unique perspectives of Latin American artists. The melodies are bright, and the instruments feature guitars, keys, horns, synths, bongos, and shakers.

programme.title: Hispanic Artists Now III
programme.desc: Hispanic Artists Now E3 — This art collection of real & imagined landscapes, soulful abstract work, & vivid surrealist portraits offers a colorful exploration Hispanic culture. The music includes rhythmic electro, percussive afro-beats, & soft-house with a modern Latin edge.

programme.title: Featured Artist: Andrew Soria's Cityscape Mementos
programme.desc: Featured Artist Series S1E1: Andrew Soria's Cityscape Mementos — Explore Andrew Soria's mesmerizing digital photo collages in “Cityscape Mementos.” His unique artistic vision offers a fresh perspective on urban architecture and culture, inviting viewers to rediscover their own cities in a new light.

programme.title: Featured Artists: Erni Vales + Sam Heydt
programme.desc: Featured Artist Series S1E3: Erni Vales + Sam Heydt — A fusion of the diverse artistic styles & visions of our featured artists. Erni Vales unleashes imagination with surreal creations that transport you to another world while Sam Heydt challenges perspectives with thought-provoking conceptual art.

programme.title: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Happy Hour E2: Colors of Mexico — A stunning collection of vibrant artwork for a festive atmosphere, featuring bold and expressive designs that celebrate color and movement.

programme.title: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Happy Hour E3: Oktoberfest — Immerse yourself in the lively spirit of Oktoberfest and the camaraderie of happy hour. With a blend of vivid colors and intricate details, this art collection transports you to bustling beer gardens, traditional attire, and clinking glasses.

programme.title: Zen Piano
programme.desc: Selections of peaceful piano set to serene background scenes that help you work and relax.

programme.title: Zen Relaxation
programme.desc: A mix of guitar, piano instrumentals to help you concentrate and feel relaxed.

programme.title: The Zen Home Spa
programme.desc: Transform your room into an oasis of wellness with ZenLIFE's Home Spa.

programme.title: Your Evening Zen
programme.desc: Music to help you wind down and de-stress at the end of your long workday.

programme.desc: Calm your soul, soothe your body, and inspire your mind with purely instrumental electro-acoustic music. The Spa is home to new age and instrumental music, creating an aural landscape that will transport you to a peaceful and tranquil place.
